metadata.name: Variable Rate Nitrogen Prescription for Corn

description: Based on satellite imagery showing crop health, a farmer wants to create a variable rate prescription for a top-dress nitrogen application.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the latest NDVI (Normalized Difference Vegetation Index) satellite image for the field.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent retrieves and displays the NDVI map.

nodes.task_description: Create management zones based on the NDVI values (low, medium, high biomass).

expected_outcome.expected: Agent generates a map with 3 distinct nitrogen management zones.

nodes.task_description: Generate a variable rate nitrogen prescription, applying more N to the lower-scoring zones and less to the higher-scoring zones.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent creates a downloadable prescription file for a fertilizer spreader.
